steps.title: Compare consecutive changes
steps.content:
Estimate the change for each listed pair of years from the line graph.
$$2003\text{-}2004:\ 2-2=0$$
$$2008\text{-}2009:\ 20-8=12$$
$$2009\text{-}2010:\ 26-20=6$$
$$2010\text{-}2011:\ 46-26=20$$

steps.title: Choose the greatest change
steps.content: The greatest change among the listed intervals is $20$, which occurs from $2010$ to $2011$. The answer is D.
